h:
THE MOST EXPENSIVE
LAND IN NEPAL COSTS
MORE THAN MANHATTAN.

b.t: DURBAR MARG:
$22,000 PER SQUARE METRE.

ONE OF THE TOP 10 MOST EXPENSIVE IN THE WORLD.

AVERAGE NEPALI CIVIL SERVANT SALARY: NPR 36,000/MONTH.
YEARS OF THAT SALARY TO BUY A SMALL LALITPUR PLOT:
37 YEARS.

4X FASTER THAN

foot.t: A NEPALI WORKER'S SALARY WILL NEVER CATCH UP UNDER THIS SYSTEM.

h:
"EVEN IF I SELL MY
ANCESTRAL PROPERTY,
I CANNOT BUY LAND
IN KATHMANDU."

b.t: — BABURAM PANDEY, SECTION OFFICER,
MINISTRY OF LAND REFORMS.
HE EARNS NPR 36,000/MONTH. THE MINISTRY RESPONSIBLE FOR FIXING THE LAND PROBLEM CANNOT AFFORD TO LIVE IN THE CITY IT GOVERNS.

steps.t: 1/3 OF NEPALIS MOVED FROM BIRTHPLACE. BAGMATI PROVINCE: 47.3% RECENT ARRIVALS. VALLEY CAN'T EXPAND GEOGRAPHICALLY.
LAND = PRIMARY COLLATERAL. PRICES RISE → BORROW MORE → BUY MORE LAND → PRICES RISE FURTHER.
NPR 1.17 TRILLION/YEAR (22% OF GDP). NO PRODUCTIVE INVESTMENT IN NEPAL EXCEPT LAND AT 27.7% RETURN.
POLITICIANS BUY LAND IN PROJECT ZONES BEFORE ANNOUNCEMENTS. NIJGADH: INDUSTRIALISTS BOUGHT 50 BIGHAS IN ANTICIPATION.

b.t: LAND RISES → BORROW MORE → BUY MORE LAND → LAND RISES HIGHER →

NRB'S OWN ECONOMIST STATED EXPLICITLY:
"NRB SHOULD IMMEDIATELY STOP ALLOWING BORROWERS TO USE LAND AS COLLATERAL TO BUY MORE LAND."
NRB NEVER DID IT. WE'LL EXPLAIN WHY.

h:
THE PEOPLE WHO
COULD STOP IT
BENEFIT FROM IT.

b.t: FINANCE MINISTER RAM SHARAN MAHAT (HELD PORTFOLIO 6 TIMES):
BUNGALOW, FLAT, PLOTS IN BUDHANILKANTHA, CHAPALI & DHAPASI, 12 ROPANI IN KAVRE, 3 ROPANI IN NUWAKOT.
NRB GOVERNOR MAHA PRASAD ADHIKARI (REGULATES LAND-BACKED LENDING):
HOUSE IN LALITPUR, 12 ROPANI IN CHHAMPI & SAINBU, 3 BIGHA IN JHAPA.
THESE ARE THEIR OWN PUBLICLY DISCLOSED FIGURES. NOT ALLEGATIONS.

h:
CAPITAL LOCKED
IN DIRT.
NOT IN FACTORIES.

b.t: RETURN ON SPECULATIVE LAND:
27.7% ANNUALLY.
RETURN ON A SMALL GARMENT FACTORY: 12–15% WITH FAR MORE RISK.

A RATIONAL INVESTOR PICKS LAND EVERY TIME.

RESULT: NEPAL'S FDI IS 0.3–0.5% OF GDP — ONE OF SOUTH ASIA'S LOWEST. THE WORKERS WHO SHOULD BE IN FACTORIES ARE IN QATAR.

h:
NEPAL IS EATING
ITS OWN FARMLAND.

b.t: NEPAL IMPORTS RICE AND VEGETABLES FROM INDIA — DESPITE
60% OF ITS POPULATION FARMING.
A FARMER AT THE EDGE OF POKHARA CAN SELL THEIR PLOT FOR
NPR 5 MILLION — FIVE YEARS OF FARMING INCOME — IN ONE DAY.
CBS CENSUS DATA CONFIRMS URBAN LAND COVERAGE EXPANDING INTO AGRICULTURAL AREAS AROUND ALL MAJOR CITIES.

HAS NO SOLUTION.

foot.t: URBAN HOUSEHOLDS: 18.7% OF INCOME ON RENT ALONE (CBS). UN MAX STANDARD: 30% INCLUDING MORTGAGE.

h:
NEPAL'S ENTIRE
BANKING SECTOR
IS ONE LAND BET.

b.t: EVERY BUSINESS LOAN, HOME LOAN, AND PROJECT LOAN IS SECURED BY LAND.
IF LAND PRICES FALL — AS ALL BUBBLES DO — THE COLLATERAL BACKING NEPAL'S ENTIRE LOAN PORTFOLIO FALLS SIMULTANEOUSLY.
NPL RATIO ALREADY RISING IN 2024–25 DUE TO REAL ESTATE SECTOR SLOWDOWN. NEPAL HAS NO BANK RESOLUTION FRAMEWORK PREPARED FOR THIS SCENARIO.

h:
THE WEALTHIEST
PAY ALMOST ZERO
CAPITAL GAINS TAX.

b.t: BOUGHT 20 YEARS AGO: NPR 1 MILLION. SOLD TODAY:
NPR 70 MILLION.
CAPITAL GAINS TAX: 5%. BUT CALCULATED ON THE
DECLARED VALUE — OFTEN 30–50% OF ACTUAL PRICE.
BOTH BUYER AND SELLER UNDERSTATE THE TRANSACTION TO CUT TAXES. NEPAL'S MOST UNDERTAXED INCOME. OVERWHELMINGLY BENEFITS THE WEALTHIEST LANDOWNERS.

h:
NEPAL IS ON THE
FATF GREY LIST.
REAL ESTATE IS WHY.

b.t: FATF GREY-LISTED NEPAL IN FEBRUARY 2025 — CITING INADEQUATE AML FRAMEWORKS.
THE MECHANISM: CHEQUE FOR DECLARED AMOUNT (TRACEABLE). CASH FOR THE PREMIUM (UNTRACEABLE).
LAND BECOMES FORMAL. BLACK MONEY IS GONE.
THE REAL ESTATE BUBBLE IS SIMULTANEOUSLY THE ECONOMIC DISTORTION AND THE LAUNDERING MECHANISM.

h:
SINGAPORE:
78% OF CITIZENS
IN GOVT HOUSING.

b.t: HDB ESTABLISHED 1960. TODAY,
78–80% OF SINGAPOREANS LIVE IN GOVERNMENT-BUILT FLATS

SOLD AT PRICES PEGGED TO MEDIAN INCOME.

SOUTH KOREA 2005: PROGRESSIVE ANNUAL TAX ON HIGH-VALUE PROPERTY — PASSIVE LAND-HOLDING BECOMES EXPENSIVE.

TAIWAN: TAXES THE ANNUAL LAND VALUE INCREMENT — A DIRECT TAX ON UNREALISED APPRECIATION.

h:
22% OF NEPAL'S GDP
IS SENT BY WORKERS
IN FOREIGN COUNTRIES.

legend.text: THEIR FAMILIES RUN HOUSEHOLDS WITHOUT LEGAL PROPERTY RIGHTS

foot.t: MOST REMITTANCE INCOME FLOWS INTO LAND — THE ONLY INVESTMENT RETURNING 27.7% ANNUALLY.

h:
FIVE REFORMS.
ALL WITHIN EXISTING
LEGAL AUTHORITY.

steps.t: 0.5% OF MARKET VALUE/YEAR ABOVE 1 ROPANI. HOLDING LAND MUST COST MONEY. PRECEDENT: SOUTH KOREA JONGBU-SE 2005.
REGISTRATION ≥80% OF PUBLISHED MARKET RATE. ENDS CASH PREMIUM SYSTEM. DIRECTLY ADDRESSES FATF GREY LIST.
NRB CIRCULAR: BAN USING LAND AS COLLATERAL TO BUY MORE LAND. 50% DOWN PAYMENT REQUIRED. NRB ALREADY HAS THIS AUTHORITY.
PUBLIC PORTAL: ANY CITIZEN SEARCHES OWNERSHIP BY NAME. ENDS BENAMI OWNERSHIP. SUPPORTED BY CONSTITUTION ARTICLE 19.
10,000 AFFORDABLE UNITS/YEAR IN KTM + 5,000 PER PROVINCIAL CAPITAL. CONSTITUTION ARTICLE 35 MANDATES RIGHT TO HOUSING.

h:
THE ASSET
DISCLOSURES ON DAY 1
TELL EVERYTHING.

b.t: RSP'S SENIOR FIGURES' ASSET DISCLOSURES WILL SHOW WHETHER THEY HOLD THE SAME REAL ESTATE PATTERNS AS PREDECESSORS.
IF THEY DO NOT: LESS PERSONAL INTEREST IN MAINTAINING THE BUBBLE.
IF THEY DO: THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST REPRODUCES UNDER NEW MANAGEMENT.
THE ASSET DISCLOSURES ARE THE FIRST TEST. EVERYTHING ELSE FOLLOWS.

h:
THE BUBBLE WILL
CORRECT. THE ONLY
QUESTION IS HOW.

b.t: GRADUAL: POLICY INTERVENTION THAT SLOWLY DEFLATES THE BUBBLE OVER YEARS.
SUDDEN: A CREDIT EVENT. BANKS STOP LENDING. NPLS SPIKE. PRICES COLLAPSE. NO PREPARED RESPONSE.
EVERY YEAR THE INTERVENTION IS DELAYED MAKES THE EVENTUAL CRISIS WORSE. ALL PROPERTY BUBBLES CORRECT. NONE HAVE DEFIED GRAVITY FOREVER.

lines.t: THAT IS HOW MANY YEARS OF A NEPALI
